cases.name: plain-test-script-only
cases.summary: Verifier packages are ignored and only test.sh is treated as meaningful.

cases.name: unisolated-agent-judge
cases.summary: Agent judge roles are visible to solver prompts or lack verifier-only isolation.

cases.name: strategy-selection-without-artifacts
cases.summary: Strategies parse, but reward.json, aggregate policy, and reward-details preservation are incomplete.

cases.name: gold-verifier-package
cases.summary: Verifier package strategies, reward artifacts, aggregate policy, and judge isolation are all complete.
